attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway infiltrator who moves early in stages, particularly effective in coordinated attacks with teammates or other riders. Prefers to establish position in large breaks rather than late solo moves.
team_tactics: Movistar deploys him as strategic asset for jersey hunting and breakaway representation rather than pure GC support. Shows willingness to coordinate with non-teammates (Fuglsang) when tactical opportunity presents.
terrain_preference: Solid climber capable of surviving breakaways on hilly terrain, but lacks explosive acceleration on steep gradients. Time trial pacing discipline evident (sub-10min ITT). Exposed on punchy finishes requiring repeated accelerations.
vulnerability: Tactical positioning errors in breakaway contexts—tendency to over-contribute and lead out others rather than conserve for finish. Unable to match sharp accelerations from pure climbers like Barguil.
key_patterns: Infiltrates large multi-rider breakaways for strategic positioning (21-rider break Vuelta, 6-minute break Tirreno)
Demonstrates coordination with other riders in late-race testing moves (Fuglsang Tour de Suisse)
Tactical errors organizing breakaways: wasted energy leading out rather than positioning for finish (2021 Tirreno)
Solid climbing endurance but lacks final acceleration against specialized climbers (4th Tirreno, recaught Suisse)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 showed improved tactical awareness (coordinated Fuglsang attack) after 2021 positioning errors, but still unable to convert breakaway presence into wins
